The service provided is excellent; however, there are occasional instances where items are received in a compromised condition. To foster greater customer confidence, we recommend ensuring that all dispatched items are consistently fresh.

the app is actually so good for everything lyk you get everything in 10 minutes the vegetables are so fresh and delievery partners behaviour is actually good of all the partners till the date I order even though there are many options in market to get 10 mins delivery but I will stay loyal to blinkit 🥹
Missing items in my order and no proper resolution from customer support. Even after informing them that I have CCTV proof, they refused to help. Very disappointed with Blinkit's service.

Good service, but the app needs an update for IIT Delhi deliveries. After 8 PM, certain campus gates close. The app's navigation still shows the nearest straight-line paths through these closed gates, causing delivery partners to get lost or take massive detours to Gate 1. Please update the app's routing system to recognize night-time gate closures so delivery partners don't suffer. Suggested by an IIT Delhi student.
